nasb.text: Should you not also have had mercy on your fellow slave, in the same way that I had mercy on you?’

esv.text: And should not you have had mercy on your fellow servant, as I had mercy on you?’

cnv.text: 難道你不應該憐憫你的同伴，好像我憐憫你一樣嗎？’

ccb.text: 难道你不应该怜悯你的同伴，就像我怜悯你一样吗？’

csbs.text: 难道你不也该怜悯与你同做奴仆的，像我怜悯了你一样吗？’
